7-1941 when the sub-period of Mercury was operating in
the major period of Jupiter.
Chart No. 5 is an elusive horoscope. The lord of Lagna
is exalted in the 5th without any unfavourable aspects,
conjunctions or associations. This has conferred Purnayu or
full term of life. Planets supposed to be Marakas did not kill
the subject; the foundation of the horoscope is strong. The
native died on 7-8-1940 at about 12 noon in Guru Dasa,
Guru Bhukti. In the Navamsa, Guru gets Maraka power and
the Lagna aspected by Mars.
Chart No. 5-Born on 7/6-5-1861 at 4-5 a.m. (L.T.) Lat.
22" 40'N. Long. 88° 30' E.
Balance of Mercury Dasa at birth: Years 10-2-12.

Determination of Longevity 17
The student should collect a number of horoscopes of
persons dead and apply the principles given in this chapter.
Chart No. 5 is complicated and defies the intelligence of
the average astrologer.
